title: Apollo 13: The Dark Side of the Moon
original_title: Apollo 13: The Dark Side of the Moon
overview: Stranded 205,000 miles from Earth in a crippled spacecraft, astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert fight a desperate battle to survive.
